name: platform-team-visibility
description: Flip the Salt parent capability and a curated set of components from `private` to `public` so cross-tenant adoption is permitted. In a real production setup these would more likely go through `tenant-shared` with an explicit share list; `public` is used here because Salt is genuinely open-source and the demo benefits from any tenant being able to see it. Targets the orchestrator's default tenant — `target_tenant_slug` is omitted intentionally so this bundle works against whichever platform tenant the seed is invoked against.
